# XingYi Trading — Sunflower Seed Exporter

> XingYi Trading is a Chinese exporter of confectionery (in-shell, non-oil-type) sunflower seeds, based in Bayannur, Inner Mongolia — the largest sunflower-growing region in China. We supply snack brands, food-service distributors, and regional import/redistribution traders worldwide with bulk sunflower seeds across three series: 361, 363, and Tongqing No.6 (TQ6).

## What We Make

XingYi Trading supplies three confectionery sunflower seed series, all in-shell and non-oil-type (not the industrial oil-pressing cultivar):

- **361 Series** — general-purpose, volume-friendly grade. Plump, aromatic kernels suited to snacking, baking, garnishing, and cost-optimized private-label packaging.
- **363 Series (Premium Raw)** — a premium raw grade, organically grown and pesticide-free, with a consistently rich flavor. Suited to branded and health-focused retail lines.
- **Tongqing No.6 (TQ6)** — a distinct, named cultivar with a larger kernel and richer flavor than the general 361/363 grade codes, sourced from Inner Mongolia.

All three series pass through the same 16-stage inspection and grading line — raw material inspection, multi-stage screening, stone removal, color sorting, gravity separation, and X-ray inspection — before packing.

We do not currently supply oil-type sunflower seed, hulled sunflower kernels, sunflower seed oil, sunflower flour/protein powder, or pumpkin seeds.

## What Problems We Solve

- **Consistent bulk supply for snack and confectionery brands** — private-label and custom packaging available, with size/grade held consistent across harvest seasons via the 16-stage grading line.
- **Reliable sourcing for regional import/redistribution traders** — container-load volumes, standard export documentation (HS code 1206, phytosanitary certificate, certificate of origin), and a facility built for repeat-order relationships.
- **A direct, verifiable alternative to marketplace listings** — real facility photography (not stock imagery) throughout the site; see our Direct vs. Marketplace comparison page for an honest breakdown of sourcing direct versus through a trading company.

## Facility & Capacity

- Location: Linhe First Farm, Linhe District, Bayannur City, Inner Mongolia, China
- Operating since 2014
- 9 production lines
- Up to 300 tons of daily output
- 70,000+ tons of annual capacity
- 16-stage quality control and grading line on every batch

## Company

- **Legal name**: Inner Mongolia XingYi Trading Co., Ltd
- **Founded**: 2014
- **Facility location**: Linhe First Farm, Linhe District, Bayannur City, Inner Mongolia, China
- **Contact**: James Feng — james@zenbeadsgarden.com — +86 186 5336 9950 (WhatsApp)
- **Export markets**: Middle East, North America, South America, and Southeast Asia
